basic_details.job_title: IIITDM Kancheepuram Resident Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Kancheepuram (IIITDM Kancheepuram)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Kancheepuram (IIITDM Kancheepuram) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Resident Medical Officer (RMO) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 15-07-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Minimum Age: Above 45 years, Maximum Age: 63 years
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: Above 45 years Maximum Age: 63 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree with valid registration and minimum 15 years of post-qualification experience.
qualification.details: MBBS degree from a Medical College / University recognised by the National Medical Commission (NMC) / erstwhile Medical Council of India (MCI). Valid and current registration with the State Medical Council / Indian Medical Register. A minimum of 15 (fifteen) years of post-qualification experience in clinical practice / general medicine in a recognised hospital or institutional health centre.

salary_details.details: Consolidated Pay: Rs. 1,00,000/- per month (all-inclusive). No additional allowances, benefits or perquisites (other than the free campus accommodation specified above) shall be admissible. Statutory deductions, if any, will apply as per rules.

selection_process: Selection will be made on the basis of an interview / interaction before a duly constituted Selection Committee. Only shortlisted candidates fulfilling the eligibility criteria will be called for the interview. Candidates called for interview must bring all original certificates / documents for verification along with one set of self-attested photocopies. No TA / DA will be paid for attending the interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIITDM Kancheepuram Resident Medical Officer (RMO) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIITDM Kancheepuram Resident Medical Officer (RMO) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIITDM Kancheepuram Resident Medical Officer (RMO) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RMO post at IIITDM Kancheepuram?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Resident Medical Officer (RMO) position is 15-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required qualification for the Resident Medical Officer (RMO) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized institution and hold a valid registration with the State Medical Council or Indian Medical Register.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are required for this position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 15 years of post-qualification experience in clinical practice or general medicine in a recognized hospital or institutional health center is mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Resident Medical Officer (RMO) position?
faq.answer: The age limit for this post is above 45 years and up to 63 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Resident Medical Officer (RMO) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated pay of Rs. 1,00,000/- per month, which is all-inclusive.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Resident Medical Officer (RMO) position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email to [email protected] with the subject line "Application for the post of Resident Medical Officer (On Contract)".

faq.question: Q7. What documents do I need to attach with my application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of certificates for qualification, NMC/State Medical Council registration, experience, date of birth, and a recent passport-size photograph.

faq.question: Q8. Will TA/DA be provided for attending the interview?
faq.answer: No, Travel Allowance (TA) or Dearness Allowance (DA) will not be paid for attending the interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on an interview or interaction before a duly constituted Selection Committee. Only shortlisted candidates will be called.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contract position?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based position.
